title: [Control systems] ABB security advisory (AV26-346)
description: On April 13, 2026, ABB published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following product:
products: ABB CI868 AC800M product line (System 800xA) for IEC 61850 - multiple firmware versions
ABB CI850 Symphony Plus SD Series product line for IEC 61850 - multiple firmware versions
ABB PM 877 Symphony Plus MR (Melody Rack) product line for IEC 61850  firmware version 3.10 to 3.52
ABB S+ Operations using IEC 61850 - multiple versions
ABB Ability Symphony Plus  multiple versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
